content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于2月11日19:10(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年2月25日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、战斗
● 敌人「乐园帷幕」的能力有所削弱：
    ○ 状态「梦境桎梏」在击破后的「封印」效果回合数由 2 降低为 1。
    ○ 意图「神国幻象」、「神国幻象·终结」获得的触腕和触腕上限由 2 降低为 1。
 
二、问题修复
【战斗】
● 修复了唤醒体「法洛思」启灵3「微弱烛光」触发中毒效果时机错误的问题，正确时机应为在触腕攻击后触发中毒。
● 修复了唤醒体「波吕克斯」天赋「苦痛救赎」每场战斗结束时，基础伤害和「苦痛救赎」伤害效果成长最大为 99% 的问题。
● 修复了钥令「猎食决心」生效时，若本场战斗使用过「祭灵夜特调」有概率选取到既定范围以外卡牌的问题。
● 修复了造物「圣化·行道之骸」的描述不准确的问题，现在调整为受到的主动和触腕翻倍，使其与实际效果相符。
● 修复了造物「异种喉舌」、「遗落的祭祀刀」、「镭射额骨」与时灵摆系列造物未正确受到灵识研究深度加成与归档刻痕加成的问题。
 
【疾驰的欢愉专列】
● 修复了「疾驰的欢愉专列」中生命回复类造物在战斗外查看时回复数值不会受到「长途倦意」影响的问题。
● 修复了「疾驰的欢愉专列」中共鸣「真理之门」带来的灵识与物象研究深度提高效果在战斗外查看时不会生效的问题。
● 修复了「疾驰的欢愉专列」中战斗失败时，结算界面未正常显示「贵宾积分」获得详情的问题。
● 修复了「疾驰的欢愉专列」中「调查数据」的「应急灵知体使用次数」次数统计有时不正确的问题。
● 修复了「疾驰的欢愉专列」中活动界面右侧的故事文本在滑动到底部时会出现过多空白的问题。
● 修复了「疾驰的欢愉专列」中「专列轨迹」界面在部分语言设置下，左侧页签文字过于拥挤的问题。
● 修复了「疾驰的欢愉列车」中选择造物后 「确认」按钮状态显示错误的问题。
● 修复了「疾驰的欢愉专列」中在达成个人最高记录后立即开始下一次挑战时，对应「贵宾名录」的「调查数据」会被错误记录为下一次挑战的「调查数据」的问题。对于已经异常的「调查数据」很抱歉我们目前无法使之恢复正常。
 
【英语本地化】
● 修复了英语语言设置下，玩法活动「疾驰的欢愉专列」中部分唤醒体敌人名称拼写、符号格式错误的问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下，玩法活动「疾驰的欢愉专列」中部分「褪色遗骨」事件选项错误显示为机器翻译的问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下，特遣纪录「开往祈岁节的列车」中部分剧情文本包含多余代码的问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下，唤醒体「艾瑞卡」的「电磁爆发」技能描述中的数字未能正确显示的问题。
 
【一般】
● 修复了使用 PC 游玩时，在登录界面「设置」中修改分辨率不能生效的问题。
● 修复了打开「探索」关卡详情和「课题纪录」界面时，画面可能错误出现一个紫色区域的问题。
● 修复了退出「活动」和「相位对弈」界面时的动画效果可能卡顿的问题。
● 修复了在「幻梦深潜」挑战过程中将游戏切换到后台运行一段时间后，返回继续完成挑战时，深潜分数会错误的按 0 分结算和记录的问题。对于已经发生异常的深潜分数，很抱歉我们目前无法使之恢复正常。

**V2.4.2.4 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on February 11 at 19:10(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
  
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on February 25, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
  
[Update Content]
1. Battle
● The enemy's "Paradise Veil" ability has been weakened:
    ○ The duration of the "Sealed" effect of the state "Dream Chain" after being broken is reduced from 2 turns to 1.
    ○ The Tentacles and Tentacle Limit gained from "Divine Realm Mirage" and "Divine Realm Mirage: End" are reduced from 2 to 1.
 
2. Problem Fix
[Battle]
● Fixed the issue with the Awakener "Faros" where the timing of the Poison effect triggered by Enlighten 3 "Flickering Candle" was incorrect; the correct timing should be after the Tentacle attack.
● Fixed an issue where Pollux's Talent "Atonement by Pain" had a maximum growth of 99% for Base DMG and "Atonement by Pain" damage effect at the end of each battle.
● Fixed the issue where, when the Posse "Voracious Resolve" was activated, there was a chance to select a card outside the predetermined range if "Soulsfeast Special Blend" had been used during the battle.
● Fixed the inaccurate description of the Relic "Sanctification: Pathwalker's Remains," now adjusted to double the Active and Tentacle DMG received, aligning it with the actual effect.
● Fixed the issue where the Relics "Other Tongue", "Ritual Dagger", "Radium Frontal Bone", and Chrono Pendulum series did not correctly receive bonuses from Occult Research and Archive Mark.
 
[Rapture Express!]
● Fixed an issue in "Rapture Express!" where the healing amount of Relics was not affected by "Transit Fatigue" when viewed outside of battle.
● Fixed the issue in "Rapture Express!" where the Resonance "Gateway of Truth" did not activate the effects of increased Awareness and Esoteric Research when viewed outside of battle.
● Fixed the issue where the "Rapture Express!" did not properly display the details of "VIP Points" earned on the settlement screen when the battle failed.
● Fixed an issue where the "Emergency Gnosis Uses" count in the "Rapture Express!" for "Survey Data" was sometimes incorrect.
● Fixed the issue where excessive blank space appeared on the right side of the story text in the "Rapture Express!" event interface when scrolling to the bottom.
● Fixed the issue where the "Track Traces" interface in "Rapture Express!" had overcrowded text on the left tab under certain language settings.
● Fixed the issue where the "Confirm" button status was displayed incorrectly after selecting a Relic in "Joyride Express."
● Fixed the issue in "Rapture Express!" where the "Investigation Data" corresponding to the "VIP List" would be incorrectly recorded as the next challenge's "Investigation Data" when starting the next challenge immediately after achieving a personal best. We apologize that we are currently unable to restore the already abnormal "Investigation Data" to normal.

[English Localization]
● Fixed spelling and symbol format errors in the names of some Awakeners enemies in the gameplay event "Rapture Express!" under English language settings.
● Fixed the issue where some "Faded Bone" event options in the gameplay event "Rapture Express!" were incorrectly displayed as machine translations under the English language setting.
● Fixed the issue where some story text in the Special Ops "Spring Festival Express" contained extra code under English language settings.
● Fixed the issue where the numbers in the skill description of the Awakener "Erica" for "Electromagnetic Burst" did not display correctly under the English language setting.
 
[Normal]
● Fixed the issue where changing the resolution in the "Settings" on the login screen did not take effect while playing on PC.
● Fixed the issue where a purple area might incorrectly appear on the screen when opening the "Exploration" stage details and the "Curriculum" interface.
● Fixed the issue where the animation effects might freeze when exiting the "Event" and "Traphase" interfaces.
● Fixed an issue where, after switching the game to run in the background for a period during the "Phantasmal Dive" challenge, returning to complete the challenge would incorrectly calculate and record the Deep Dive score as 0 points. We apologize that we are currently unable to restore any abnormal Deep Dive scores that have already occurred.
能不能修复一下欢愉列车这个肉鸽活动没有像忘却篇一样可以选择走路径的问题<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
<:dead:1356082627509092372> 真不削弱一点肉鸽活动数值吗
should have nerfed it more in normal and hard tbh

would be nice if i could play whoever i wanted (within reason) in normal and hard and have a reasonable expectation of beating any boss, rather than having to build my team around the possibility of running into veil
